new_terms.context: Return on Invested Capital, a key metric for Neocloud profitability mentioned in the title.
Refers to hardware manufacturers like Dell or Supermicro in the server market context.
Financial term describing the increase in profit margins due to higher rental rates.
The period over which an asset is expected to be usable for its intended purpose.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 装机量 / 已安装规模
new_terms.context: Refers to the total number of GPUs (like H100) already deployed by a provider.
Capacity roll off refers to when existing contracts expire, allowing for repricing.
